positive: Minimalist illustration of a stylized fox surrounded by abstract geometric patterns and celestial elements. The fox is rendered in a clean, solid silhouette with rich autumn color grading (deep oranges, burnt umber, slate blue, and gold accents). Composition is centered and balanced, suitable for apparel printing. The background should be a clean, single-color gradient or negative space to ensure high contrast. The style should be a blend of modern vector art and Art Deco symmetry, with sharp lines and highly detailed but flat, print-ready elements. Emphasis on graphic scalability and wearability. Highly detailed, vibrant, high contrast.
